allowed_public_claim: In this bounded operational entropy scenario, pond-backed survivable-lineage replay preserved operational reconstruction and replay integrity across multiple entropy injections more effectively than visible-only replay.

claims.claim: The neutral entropy-risk gate passed before Proof 016 artifact construction.
claims.boundary: Risk review only; not public claim validation.

claims.claim: Visible-only replay and full-lineage replay used separated input sets.
claims.boundary: Mode separation is local to this proof.

claims.claim: Full-lineage replay improved at least six operational integrity dimensions in this bounded scenario.
The proof reports replay behavior under constructed entropy pressure and does not diagnose a target-system defect.
